title: Family House – 4125
fullText: Family House – 4125 code number: 4125 5 rooms4 bedrooms3 bathrooms1417 m² plot size190 m² living area Newly built detached house in Gyenesdiás, located in gorgeous nature is for sale. A stunning unobstructed view of the Lake Balaton opens from the terrace. The house was built in high quality materials. It is heated via underfloor heating operated with gas central heating. Besides underfloor heating radiators were also installed in the bedrooms. In the bedrooms and in the sitting room there were elegant parquet made of solid wood laid down. The sitting room comes with a fireplace. The basement comes with a double garage. The lot is nicely landscaped, tended, it is endowed with an automatic irrigation system. There is a swimming pool on the terrace, which opens from the sitting room. The house is utterly new, it hasn't been inhabitated yet. This is a very elegant property with panoramic view! A rare find, indeed! DataBuilt in2021 Renovated in- Number of Rooms5 Number of Bedrooms4 Number of Bathrooms3 Plot Size1417 m² Total area343 m² Area190 m² floor3 Energy class- FeaturesDouble garageParkingBuilt-in kitchenCentral heatingFireplaceAir conditionerGreen beltDescription The house is situated in a popular holiday resort near Keszthely on the northern coastline of Lake Balaton. Hévíz is 8 km away. There are restaurants, shops, surgeries, a school and a kindergarten in the settlement. The beach of the settlement is famous in the Balaton region. There are sport facilities for horseback riding, running, cycling and hiking. Several buses run daily to Keszthely and Hévíz. Layout: Downstairs: double garage 45.77 sqm, terrace 40.69 sqm, terrace 27.28 sqm, entryway 6.93 sqm, walk-in wardrobe 5.25 sqm, toilet 2.52 sqm, laundry room 7.81 sqm, sitting room + dining room 51.48 sqm, kitchen 11.02 sqm, larder 3.70 sqm, corridor 9.21 sqm, bedroom 18.64 sqm, bathroom + toilet 8.00 sqm, bedroom 14.28 sqm, bathroom + toilet 7.14 sqm. Upstairs: bedroom 15.24 sqm, bedroom 14.52 sqm, corridor 4.95 sqm, bathroom + toilet 7.86 sqm, balcony 41.43 sqm. Fixtures: The property is connected to the electricity, gas, water and drainage main systems. Entry phone, air conditioners, alarm system are installed. Heating system: underfloor heating via gas central heating. Plastic windows with 3-layered insulating panes. Floor coatings: ceramic tiles, wooden parquet. The lot is fenced off.
